_comment: Paadhai recommended hooks for Claude Code. Optional — install via /paadhai:project-init. Mirrors deterministic rules in references/git-rules.md (R-G1 through R-G8).
_install: Merge into your project-level .claude/settings.json. Do not install globally — these are project-aware.

PreToolUse._rule: R-G3 + R-G4 — block git add -A and bypass flags before they execute

hooks.command: node -e "const cmd=process.env.TOOL_INPUT||''; if(/git\\s+add\\s+(-A|\\.|--all)\\b/.test(cmd))throw new Error('R-G3 violation: stage specific files, never git add -A. See references/git-rules.md');if(/--no-verify|--no-gpg-sign|commit\\.gpgsign=false/.test(cmd))throw new Error('R-G4 violation: hook/signature bypass forbidden. See references/git-rules.md');"

hooks._rule: R-G2 — block force push to main or develop
hooks.command: node -e "const cmd=process.env.TOOL_INPUT||'';const fp=/git\\s+push.*(--force|--force-with-lease|-f\\b)/.test(cmd);const main=/(\\bmain\\b|\\bdevelop\\b|\\bmaster\\b)/.test(cmd);if(fp&&main)throw new Error('R-G2 violation: never force-push to main/develop. See references/git-rules.md');"

PostToolUse._rule: R-G1 + R-G6 — validate commit message after a commit was attempted (advisory, non-blocking)

hooks.command: bash -c 'cmd="$TOOL_INPUT"; [[ "$cmd" == git\ commit* ]] || exit 0; subj=$(git log -1 --pretty=%s 2>/dev/null); body=$(git log -1 --pretty=%B 2>/dev/null); if ! echo "$subj" | grep -Eq "^(feat|fix|perf|refactor|test|chore|docs|ci|build|style|revert)(\\([a-zA-Z0-9_-]+\\))?: .{1,72}$"; then echo "R-G1 advisory: subject does not match conventional commit format" >&2; fi; if echo "$cmd" | grep -q "feature/\\|fix/" && ! echo "$body" | grep -Eq "(Refs|Fixes)\\s+#[0-9]+"; then echo "R-G6 advisory: missing Refs/Fixes #N in commit body" >&2; fi'
